text:
When an AI refuses a prompt, it shouldn't look like the server caught on fire. 

We just merged a tiny but satisfying fix (PR #11722): content policy rejections now correctly return a 422 error instead of a 500.

500 means "we broke." 
422 means "we understood you, but we can't draw that."

It's a small quality-of-life update for everyone building apps with the API. Less panic in your error logs, more accurate debugging. 

Everything is open on our GitHub. Happy coding. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #api #debugging #softwareengineering #cozygaming
